subject: The supermarket question I could not answer
preheader: How a plastic tray of beef mince led to a different kind of grocery store.
body:
Hi {first_name},

I want to tell you why FarmThru exists.

A few years ago I was holding a tray of beef mince in a supermarket. Grey around the edges. The label said "Product of Australia" but nothing else. No farm name. No region. No idea how old it was or how far it had travelled.

I had young kids at home. I was feeding them this every week. And I could not answer the most basic question: where did this come from?

That question stuck.

I started visiting farms. Rachel Ward's property in Kempsey, where cattle graze on regenerative pasture. Bundarra Farm, raising pork in open paddocks. Collins Wild Caught, bringing in wild-caught Alaskan salmon from the South Coast.

These farmers were producing extraordinary food. The big chains were paying them barely enough to keep going.

So we built FarmThru. A grocery store that connects farms directly to families through a collection hub in Brookvale. No wholesalers in between. Food that is days old, not weeks. And the farmer earns a fairer price.

Rachel believed in what we were building. Her farm became one of our key partners. Her 100% grass-fed beef is some of the best you will find anywhere in NSW.

I am not going to pretend this is easy. Building a new kind of grocery store is hard. But every time a family collects their order and says they can taste the difference, I know we are heading the right way.

Over the next few days, we'll show you the farms and the food. More soon.

Rachel & the FarmThru team
creative_brief: Personal founder email. Plain text style with minimal formatting. Small headshot of the founder in the signature area. Single CTA button to the shop. Should feel like a genuine letter from someone who cares about food, not a marketing broadcast.
primary_text: I want to tell you why FarmThru exists. A few years ago I was holding a tray of beef mince in a supermarket.
headline: The supermarket question I could not answer
